title: Roulette
writer: Lewis Allen Browne, Gerald C. Duffy, William MacHarg
actors: Edith Roberts, Norman Trevor, Maurice Costello
plot: Lois Carrington becomes the ward of gambler John Tralee when her father drops dead during a card game with Tralee. Tralee educates Lois and gives her a home of her own, but he uses her as a decoy in his gambling joint, where she m...
